posts.author: saumyasamadhiya (Saumya)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

Currently when we try to find a project on our Monday.com boards, it doesn’t necessarily bring up the right results if we haven’t entered the details exactly word to word. For example if a project is called XYZ 020 Test ongoing project. Monday might not bring up the right result if someone enters it as xyz020

What are you trying to achieve

Brining efficiencies in our searches across our boards given that we have 500 plus projects on our boards
